tasks.subject: Task 1 (G1): Stand up CI + local gate, fix HEAD clippy lints
tasks.description:
Add .github/workflows/ci.yml (fmt, clippy+test with libopenblas-dev, non-blocking audit) and scripts/check.sh; fix 3 field_reassign_with_default clippy lints in antenna-model/tests/integration/{error_tests.rs:76-78,128-131,resilience_tests.rs:52-55}; mark G1-hosting register row Decided (GitHub). Verify: bash scripts/check.sh exits 0. No change under antenna-model/src/model/.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml", "scripts/check.sh", "antenna-model/tests/integration/error_tests.rs", "antenna-model/tests/integration/resilience_tests.rs", "docs/roadmap-2026-07.md"], "verifyCommand": "bash scripts/check.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["clippy --workspace --all-targets -D warnings exits 0", "scripts/check.sh exits 0", "ci.yml has fmt/clippy+test/audit jobs, installs libopenblas-dev", "G1-hosting row Decided (GitHub)", "no change under src/model/"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2 (G2): Make CLAUDE.md true (docs-only)
tasks.description:
Docs-only edits to CLAUDE.md: live B-spline correction, Sprints 1-7 complete, remove direct_path.rs/surface.rs/numerical_stability.rs, antennas.toml->antennas.yaml, precomputed-.bin claim (D9), property-tests annotation (D7), module map (add coordinates_3d.rs, correction_interpolator.rs). Verify: git diff --name-only lists only CLAUDE.md. Do NOT touch architecture.md/design doc (D5).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "git diff --name-only && grep -nE 'antennas\\.toml|direct_path\\.rs|surface\\.rs|numerical_stability\\.rs' CLAUDE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no unimplemented-B-spline claim; sprint status 1-7 complete", "no deleted-module references", "antennas.toml->antennas.yaml", "property-tests annotated D7", "precomputed-artifact claim corrected D9", "module map matches ls; only CLAUDE.md changed"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3 (G3): Fix broken example requests + lock with a drift test
tasks.description:
Fix vehicle_attitude in examples/requests/{gain_request,gain_request_geodetic,batch_request}.json to [w,x,y,z] array (w-first per schemas.rs:263; Euler->identity [1,0,0,0]); delete vehicle_attitude from heatmap_request.json (not a HeatmapRequest field); fix same shapes in other examples/ files; create antenna-model/tests/example_requests_deserialize.rs iterating examples/requests/ with explicit filename->type map, panicking on unmapped. Verify: cargo test -p antenna-model --test example_requests_deserialize. NO schemas.rs change.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/requests/gain_request.json", "examples/requests/gain_request_geodetic.json", "examples/requests/batch_request.json", "examples/requests/heatmap_request.json", "examples/api_requests.json", "examples/curl-examples.sh", "examples/postman_collection.json", "examples/python_examples.py", "examples/QUICKSTART.md", "examples/README.md", "antenna-model/tests/example_requests_deserialize.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model --test example_requests_deserialize", "acceptanceCriteria": ["four examples deserialize into their types", "vehicle_attitude uses [w,x,y,z]; Euler->identity", "heatmap_request.json has no vehicle_attitude", "drift test maps filename->type, panics on unmapped", "grep '\"w\":|roll_deg' examples/ clean", "schemas.rs unchanged"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire GitHub remote and activate CI
tasks.description:
OUTWARD-FACING: add origin -> github.com/blstoll/antenna-model, confirm branch with maintainer, push (no force), watch first CI run. Verify: gh run list shows a run; clippy+test green.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "gh run list --limit 1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["origin points at github.com/blstoll/antenna-model", "branch pushed, CI run triggered", "fmt and clippy+test green on first run"], "modelTier": "standard", "requiresUserSpecification": true}
```
